zh.lifeSummary: Thomas de Stansfeld是John de Stansfeld和Mary le Fleming的兒子，於1405年出生在英國越可爾史坦菲爾德。他於1423年與Alice de Saville在英國越可爾史坦菲爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stansfeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stansfield
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Stansfield (Yorkshire) and Stansfield in Rochdale (Lancashire). The placenames may derive from an Old English personal name Stān (genitive Stānes) + Old English feld ‘open country’. However, there is little evidence to support the suggestion that such a personal name may have existed, and the initial element may be Old English stānes, genitive of stān ‘stone, rock’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas de Stansfeld was born in 1405, in Stansfield, Yorkshire, England as the son of John de Stansfeld and Mary le Fleming. He married Alice de Saville in 1423, in Stansfield, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas de Stansfeld est né en 1405, à Stansfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, fils de John de Stansfeld et Mary le Fleming. Il a épousé Alice de Saville en 1423, à Stansfield, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas de Stansfeld wurde 1405 in Stansfield, Yorkshire, England, als Sohn von John de Stansfeld und Mary le Fleming geboren. Er hat 1423 in Stansfield, Yorkshire, England Alice de Saville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas de Stansfeld è nato il nel 1405 nel Stansfield, Yorkshire, England come figlio di John de Stansfeld e Mary le Fleming. Lui sposato Alice de Saville nel 1423, nel Stansfield, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie.

ja.York, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアヨーク
ja.Stansfield, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスタンスフィールド
ja.Stansfield, West Yorkshire, England, Uni: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスタンスフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Stansfeldは1405年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスタンスフィールドでJohn de StansfeldとMary le Flemingの息子として生まれた。1423年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスタンスフィールドでAlice de Savilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Stansfeld(은)는 1405년 영국 요르크실르 스탠스필드에서 John de Stansfeld(와)과 Mary le Fleming의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1423년 영국 요르크실르 스탠스필드에서 Alice de Saville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Stansfield, West Yorkshire, England, Uni: Stansfield, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas de Stansfeld nasceu em 1405, em Stansfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filho de John de Stansfeld e Mary le Fleming. Ele casou-se com Alice de Saville em 1423, em Stansfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas de Stansfeld родился в 1405 г. в местности стансфиелд, еркшир, Англия. Его родителей звали John de Stansfeld и Mary le Fleming. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Saville в 1423 г. в местности стансфиелд, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas de Stansfeld nació en 1405, en Stansfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hijo de John de Stansfeld y Mary le Fleming. Se casó con Alice de Saville en 1423, en Stansfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas.
